name: duplicate-daily-submission
description: Same Enrollment + same Activity Date as an existing counted Submission. 115 presets Duplicate Review Status=Count It, so this tests XP-per-Submission, NOT the 007a Needs Review flow.
prerequisites: Existing counted Submission on same Denver day
prohibited_side_effects: Second XP Event on prior Submission RID
safe_rerun_behavior: Creates counted duplicate-day Submission by design of 115
cleanup_instructions: Product decision needed for whether Count It preset should remain
manual_requirements: Decision: should duplicate-day scenarios leave Duplicate Review Status blank for 007a?

known_evidence.note: 3 PROD Submissions on 2026-07-23 all Count It with 1 XP each
